global.description: The ad features a modern design with layered abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options with a discount.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a base for other elements.

elements.label: Main visual area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center featuring abstract shapes, suggesting a modern design.

elements.label: Secondary visual area
elements.description: Another rectangular area in the center, slightly overlapping with the first, enhancing the layered effect.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle in the center, adding depth to the visual composition.

elements.label: Left visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area on the left side, contributing to the overall abstract design.

elements.label: Right visual area
elements.description: A larger rectangular area on the right side, balancing the composition with its size.

elements.label: Small left shape
elements.description: A small circular shape on the left side, adding a playful element to the design.

elements.label: Right circular shape
elements.description: A larger circular shape on the right side, complementing the smaller left shape.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small area at the bottom left displaying a discount percentage in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A small rectangular button below the discount badge, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom featuring a bold headline and supporting text.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Flexible booking options 30% Start now

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo area at the top left, representing the brand identity of NomadLayer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern abstract with bold colors, flexible booking options, discount.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the main visual elements are centered, and the CTA is positioned below the discount badge.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter, Flexible booking options, 30%, Start now, NomadLayer
